top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs Lops $500 Off Gold Target on No Fed Cuts This Year
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. cut its year-end gold forecast by $500 an ounce as the Federal Reserve is no longer seen reducing rates in 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Thailand Sees Inflows as Funds Exit Indonesia, Finance Head Says
top_signals.summary: Thailand is attracting capital inflows partly at the expense of Indonesia, as investors seek markets with stronger fiscal fundamentals and lower perceived risks, according to its finance chief.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Burnham’s win poses challenge to Starmer
top_signals.summary: Greater Manchester mayor to return to parliament as an MP and be able to challenge rival to be UK prime minister
